positive: Minimalist abstract forest creatures portrait. A majestic silhouette of a stylized fox and a gentle woodland deer leaping through lush, stylized ferns and ivy. The scene should feature a high-contrast, two-tone palette of deep sapphire blue and forest emerald green, accented with subtle golden gold foil textures. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for seamless repetition on fabric, utilizing strong negative space. Overhead, incorporate a crescent moon and stylized stars rendered in thin, graphic lines. Clean line art style meets modern geometric abstraction. Vector art aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing. --ar 1:1
